title: helichrysum leucosphaerum
intro: Helichrysum leucosphaerum, also known as yellow everlasting, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum leucosphaerum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. These benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting wound healing and immune function. Helichrysum leucosphaerum is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
